reviews.comment:
Están sobrecargados de trabajo y no atienden como corresponde. Demoraron tanto (días) en pasar un presupuesto que tuve que llevar el auto a otro taller que lo resolvieron (presupuesto y trabajo terminado) en el día. Con lo que cobra el ACA la cuota de socio es una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
They're overworked and don't provide adequate service. It took them so long (days) to provide an estimate that I had to take the car to another shop, where they resolved the issue (estimate and completed the work) on the same day. Considering the ACA membership fee, it's a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyb3JQQjNRRRAB
